LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarshThought.stages.0.label: 被严酷压迫
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarshThought.stages.0.descript: 天哪！那些殖民者在压迫我们...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrenceThought.stages.0.des: 哦！那些狱卒真是吓人...我不敢有任何行动...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEqualityThought.stages.0.label: 被平等对待
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEqualityThought.stages.0.descr: 天哪，作为一个囚犯我居然被平等对待了！
